title: Restore UDP ingress bounds checking for ports, lengths, checksums and malformed sources
description: Ensure UdpDatagram.from_bytes validates port ranges (0-65535), length field consistency, mandatory checksum for IPv6 (drop if 0 or invalid), source address validation. Update schc_channel.py:_on_inner, node_channel.py:_on_node_receive to explicitly drop on any validation failure with appropriate logging/metrics. Align with RFC 8200/768.
